_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Mata Mansa Devi Temple
temples.description: A major Shakti temple complex in Panchkula, especially visited during Navratri.

temples.name: Sheetala Devi Temple
temples.description: A revered Sheetala Mata shrine in Gurugram, described by Haryana Tourism as a Shakti Peeth.

temples.name: Sthaneshwara Mahadev Temple
temples.description: A historic Shiva shrine at Thanesar, part of Kurukshetra's sacred landscape.

temples.name: Agroha Dham
temples.description: A large Hindu temple complex at Agroha in Hisar district.

temples.name: Chandi Mandir
temples.description: A Devi temple near Chandigarh and Panchkula, associated with the name Chandigarh.
